ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "fabric" TEXT /* Fabric of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "size_chart" TEXT /* Size chart for the product */,
  "care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the product */,
  "material_composition" TEXT /* Material composition of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "swim" INTEGER /* SWIM measurement */,
  "chest_cm" INTEGER /* Chest measurement in cm */,
  "waist_cm" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in cm */,
  "waist_in" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "length_cm" INTEGER /* Length measurement in cm */,
  "length_in" INTEGER /* Length measurement in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hex code of the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_colors" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fabrics" (
  "fabric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fabric */,
  "fabric_name" TEXT /* Name of the fabric */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the fabric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fabric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_fabrics" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "fabric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fabric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "fabric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alt text for the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the warehouse */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_suppliers" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the category the product belongs to
Unique identifier for each inventory entry
Quantity of the product in the warehouse
Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered)
Unique identifier for each order item
Unique identifier for each shipping entry
